message:
feat(widgets): improve dialog modal and help widget functionality

Enhancements to the modal dialog and help overlay widgets for better
usability and visual consistency.

dialog.rs improvements:
- Add support for custom button styling and icons
- Implement focus ring animation for active button
- Add keyboard navigation hints in footer
- Support variable-width dialogs with min/max constraints
- Add backdrop blur effect option for modal overlay
- Improve button layout algorithm for long labels
- Support async action handlers for confirmation dialogs
- Add dialog result type for structured response handling

help.rs refinements:
- Improve key binding display formatting
- Add grouping support for related commands
- Support multi-key chord notation (e.g., "Ctrl+K Ctrl+O")
- Add search/filter functionality for large binding sets
- Improve column alignment for mixed-length descriptions
- Support contextual help based on current widget focus
- Add dismiss-on-any-key option for simple overlays

Visual improvements:
- Consistent border styling with configurable radius
- Shadow depth options for modal layering
- Respect terminal color capabilities for gradients
- High-contrast mode support for accessibility

These changes improve the polish of modal interactions across
FrankenTUI applications while maintaining the minimal API surface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
